# Natural Wood Art

A handmade crafts brand specializing in the artful fusion of natural woods вҖ” olive and acacia вҖ” with epoxy resin to create functional and decorative pieces. The product line includes elegant natural cutting boards and large handcrafted mezuzahs, reflecting a blend of traditional craftsmanship and modern artisan aesthetics. The brand carries a warm, organic, and artisanal vibe with deep cultural and spiritual undertones, particularly through the Judaica elements like the mezuzah.

Source: https://nwooda.com

---

## handmade craft shops вҖ” Natural Wood Art

URL: https://nwooda.com
Description: Explore handmade craft shops reimagined вҖ” olive wood, acacia, and epoxy resin fused into cutting boards and mezuzahs. Shop unique handmade gifts online today.

## Where the trees of the Holy Land meet you  Olive and acacia trees

## ЧҗЧһЧ Ч•ЧӘ ЧўЧҘ ЧҳЧ‘ЧўЧҷ






### ЧһЧ•ЧҰЧЁЧҷЧқ ЧһЧҷЧ•Ч—Ч“ЧҷЧқ Ч‘ЧўЧ‘Ч•Ч“ЧӘ ЧҷЧ“


ЧҷЧҰЧҷЧЁЧ•ЧӘ ЧўЧҘ Ч–ЧҷЧӘ Ч•Ч©ЧЁЧЈ ЧҗЧӨЧ•Ч§ЧЎЧҷ Ч”Чҹ ЧһЧҷЧ–Ч•Ч’ ЧһЧ“Ч”ЧҷЧқ Ч©Чң ЧҷЧ•ЧӨЧҷ ЧҳЧ‘ЧўЧҷ Ч’Ч•ЧңЧһЧҷ Ч•ЧҗЧһЧ Ч•ЧӘ ЧһЧ•Ч“ЧЁЧ ЧҷЧӘ. Ч”Ч Ч” Ч”ЧЎЧ‘ЧЁ ЧўЧң ЧһЧ•ЧҰЧЁЧҷЧқ Ч‘ЧўЧ‘Ч•Ч“ЧӘ ЧҷЧ“ ЧҗЧңЧ” Ч‘ЧўЧ‘ЧЁЧҷЧӘ, Ч”ЧһЧӨЧ•ЧЁЧҳ ЧңЧӨЧҷ Ч”Ч§ЧЎЧқ Ч©ЧңЧ”Чқ Ч•Ч”ЧӘЧ”ЧңЧҷЧҡ ЧһЧҗЧ—Ч•ЧЁЧҷЧ”Чқ.


ЧңЧһЧ“ ЧўЧ•Ч“






### Ч§ЧЁЧ© Ч—ЧҷЧӘЧ•Чҡ ЧһЧўЧҘ Ч–ЧҷЧӘ Ч•Ч©ЧЁЧЈ ЧҗЧӨЧ•Ч§ЧЎЧҷ


Ч§ЧЁЧ© Ч—ЧҷЧӘЧ•Чҡ Ч–Ч” Ч”Ч•Чҗ ЧҷЧҰЧҷЧЁЧ” ЧҗЧ•ЧһЧ Ч•ЧӘЧҷЧӘ ЧҷЧ•Ч§ЧЁЧӘЧҷЧӘ Ч”ЧһЧ©ЧңЧ‘ЧӘ ЧҗЧӘ Ч”ЧҷЧ•ЧӨЧҷ Ч”ЧӣЧӨЧЁЧҷ Ч•Ч”ЧўЧӘЧҷЧ§ Ч©Чң ЧўЧҘ Ч–ЧҷЧӘ ЧҳЧ‘ЧўЧҷ ЧўЧқ Ч”ЧҗЧЎЧӘЧҳЧҷЧ§Ч” Ч”Ч—ЧңЧ§Ч” Ч•Ч”ЧһЧ•Ч“ЧЁЧ ЧҷЧӘ Ч©Чң Ч©ЧЁЧЈ Ч Ч•Ч–ЧңЧҷ. ЧӣЧң Ч§ЧЁЧ© Ч”Ч•Чҗ ЧҷЧҰЧҷЧЁЧ” ЧҷЧҷЧ—Ч•Ч“ЧҷЧӘ, ЧӣЧҷЧ•Ч•Чҹ Ч©Ч”Ч©ЧЁЧЈ ЧўЧ•Ч§Ч‘ ЧҗЧ—ЧЁ Ч”Ч§Ч•Ч•ЧҷЧқ Ч”ЧҳЧ‘ЧўЧҷЧҷЧқ Ч•Ч”ЧҗЧ•ЧЁЧ’Ч ЧҷЧҷЧқ Ч”ЧҷЧҷЧ—Ч•Ч“ЧҷЧҷЧқ Ч©Чң ЧңЧ•Ч— Ч”ЧўЧҘ Ч”ЧЎЧӨЧҰЧҷЧӨЧҷ Ч©Ч‘Ч• Ч ЧўЧ©Ч” Ч©ЧҷЧһЧ•Ч©.


ЧңЧһЧ“ ЧўЧ•Ч“






###

### ЧһЧ–Ч•Ч–Ч” ЧһЧўЧҘ Ч–ЧҷЧӘ Ч•ЧҗЧӨЧ•Ч§ЧЎЧҷ


ЧһЧ–Ч•Ч–Ч•ЧӘ Ч”ЧһЧ©ЧңЧ‘Ч•ЧӘ ЧўЧҘ Ч–ЧҷЧӘ Ч•ЧҗЧӨЧ•Ч§ЧЎЧҷ (Ч©ЧЁЧЈ ЧЎЧҷЧ ЧӘЧҳЧҷ) Ч”Чҹ ЧҷЧҰЧҷЧЁЧ•ЧӘ ЧҗЧһЧ Ч•ЧӘ ЧҷЧҷЧ—Ч•Ч“ЧҷЧ•ЧӘ Ч”ЧһЧ©ЧңЧ‘Ч•ЧӘ Ч—Ч•ЧһЧЁЧҷЧқ ЧҳЧ‘ЧўЧҷЧҷЧқ Ч•Ч’Ч•ЧңЧһЧҷЧҷЧқ ЧўЧқ ЧўЧҷЧҰЧ•Ч‘ ЧһЧ•Ч“ЧЁЧ Чҷ Ч•ЧҷЧ•Ч§ЧЁЧӘЧҷ. Ч”Ч©ЧҷЧңЧ•Ч‘ Ч”Ч–Ч” ЧҷЧ•ЧҰЧЁ ЧһЧЁЧҗЧ” "Natural Wood Art" Ч©Ч‘Ч• ЧӣЧң ЧһЧ–Ч•Ч–Ч” Ч”ЧҷЧҗ ЧҷЧ—ЧҷЧ“Ч” Ч‘ЧһЧҷЧ Ч”.


ЧңЧһЧ“ ЧўЧ•Ч“











### Olive Wood & Epoxy Resin


The Fusion of Nature and Art: Olive Wood & Epoxy Resin Olive Wood and Epoxy Resin products represent a perfect harmony between ancient tradition and modern innovation. By combining the raw, organic beauty of centuries-old olive trees with the sleek, versatile nature of high-quality resin, craftsmen create functional  pieces of art that are both durable and visually stunning.    One-of-a-Kind Aesthetics: Because no two olive wood slabs are identical, every item-from cutting boards to mezuzahs-is a unique masterpiece. The resin follows the "Live Edge" (natural contour) of the wood, ensuring no two pieces are ever the same.


ЧңЧһЧ“ ЧўЧ•Ч“









## Featured Products


Loading products...


View All Products вҶ’








## Shop by Category


Loading products...











Our Craft

## Where Nature Meets Artistry


Every piece we create begins with a reverence for natural materials вҖ” chosen, shaped, and finished entirely by hand. This is handmade craft at its most intentional.














### Handpicked Natural Hardwoods


We source only the finest olive and acacia wood вҖ” each plank chosen for its unique grain character, natural colour variation, and lasting durability. No two pieces are ever alike, because no two trees are alike.












### Artful Resin Fusion


Our signature river-blue epoxy resin is hand-poured into natural wood channels, creating luminous veins of colour that mirror flowing water. Each pour is carefully timed, layered, and cured to achieve a glass-smooth, food-safe finish that endures for generations.












### Meaningful Handcrafted Finishing


Every edge is hand-sanded through progressive grits. Every surface is oiled, buffed, and inspected before leaving our workshop. From natural cutting boards to handcrafted mezuzahs, the finishing is where intention becomes heirloom.






















Signature Works

## Each Piece Tells the Story of Its Wood


No two pieces from Natural Wood Art are alike. The grain movement of olive and acacia, the organic flow of blue epoxy resin rivers, and the quiet decisions made during hand-finishing вҖ” together they make every cutting board, mezuzah, and decorative object a singular artifact. These are not mass-produced goods; they are handmade gifts shaped by the material itself.


- River Cutting Boards Olive & acacia wood with flowing epoxy resin channels

- Handcrafted Mezuzahs Large-format olive wood Judaica with resin inlay

- Decorative Objects Serving boards, art panels, and bespoke commissions




Explore the Collection






































What Our Customers Say

## Crafted with Intention,Received with Emotion





















"I gave this mezuzah as a wedding gift and the couple was moved to tears. The way the olive wood grain flows into the blue resin вҖ” it looks like a river running through ancient stone. You can feel the soul in every inch of it. Truly a handmade gift unlike anything online."





Rachel M.
Wedding Gift












"The acacia cutting board is a work of functional art. The craftsmanship is extraordinary вҖ” every edge is perfectly finished, the epoxy inlay is smooth as glass. I use it daily and it still looks like it belongs in a gallery. Worth every penny for shopping handmade."





Daniel K.
Home Gift












"As a Judaica collector, I have high standards for mezuzahs. This one exceeded all of them. The large format, the natural olive wood, the flowing resin вҖ” it carries genuine spiritual weight alongside its beauty. It is the centerpiece of our home's entryway."





Miriam S.
Judaica Collector

Whether you are searching for a meaningful handmade gift, a one-of-a-kind olive wood cutting board, or a beautifully crafted mezuzah for your home вҖ” we would love to hear from you. Reach out to explore available pieces or start a conversation about something made just for you.

## Craftsmanship вҖ” Natural Wood Art

URL: https://nwooda.com/craftsmanship
Description: Craftsmanship | Natural Wood Art. handmade craft shops

Craftsmanship вҖ” Natural Wood Art

- Craftsmanship

0










рҹҮ®рҹҮұ ЧўЧ‘ЧЁЧҷЧӘ
рҹҮ©рҹҮӘ Deutsch
рҹҮ«рҹҮ· FranГ§ais








All Products













Our Philosophy

# Where Raw Wood Becomes a Living Keepsake



Every piece we create begins with a conversation between material and maker. We work exclusively with olive and acacia вҖ” two woods that carry centuries of warmth, grain, and story in every ring. No two slabs are alike, and we honor that truth rather than sand it away.


Epoxy resin enters our process not as a shortcut, but as an artistic companion вҖ” a way to preserve the natural voids, cracks, and edges that give each board or mezuzah its singular character. The result is a handmade craft that bridges functional beauty with spiritual meaning: cutting boards that grace the kitchen table, and mezuzahs that mark the threshold of a home with intention.


This is shopping handmade in its truest sense вҖ” each object touched, shaped, and finished by a single pair of hands, made for those who believe that the things we live with should carry genuine soul.






Handcrafted to Order





Olive & Acacia Wood





Resin as Artistry








Natural variation is never sanded away вҖ” it is the signature.












From Forest to Finish

## The Making of Every Piece



Each creation from our handmade craft shop begins with patience вҖ” a quiet, deliberate journey through four essential stages that transform raw natural materials into functional art.







01





Selecting the Slab





### Selecting the Slab



Every piece begins with a single, deliberate choice. We source our slabs of olive wood and acacia directly from trusted growers, hand-selecting each board for its grain character, natural edge integrity, and structural soundness. No two slabs are alike вҖ” the swirling patterns, knots, and color variations are what make each finished piece entirely one of a kind. We look for material that tells a story before a single cut is made.












02





### Planning the Resin Pour



Before a drop of epoxy resin is mixed, we spend time with each slab вҖ” studying its voids, natural cracks, and live edges to determine where the river of resin will flow most beautifully. The resin colour is chosen with intention: our signature river-blue tones echo the organic meeting of water and earth. Pigment ratios are measured precisely, and the mould is set to guide the pour along the wood's natural contours. This planning stage is where artistry meets material science.






Planning the Pour











03





Shaping & Finishing





### Shaping & Finishing



Once the resin has cured fully вҖ” a process we never rush вҖ” the real sculpting begins. We move through progressive grits of hand-sanding, starting coarse to level the surface and refining down to ultra-fine grits that reveal the wood's true luminosity. The boundary where grain meets resin is coaxed smooth until it becomes seamless to the touch. Edges are shaped and softened by hand, whether left organically raw or refined into clean lines, depending on the piece's intended character.











04




### Final Sealing & Inspection



The final stage is where each piece earns its place in your home. Food-safe oils and protective sealants are applied by hand in multiple coats, enhancing the wood's natural warmth and locking in the resin's depth. We inspect every surface in raking light вҖ” checking for imperfections, ensuring the finish is flawless, and confirming that the piece meets our standard for handmade gifts worth keeping for a lifetime. Only then is it signed, wrapped, and ready to leave the studio.






Final Inspection













Our Materials


## The Wood Beneath the Art


Every piece begins with a choice of wood вҖ” a choice that shapes texture, warmth, and story. We work exclusively with two noble species, each selected for its singular character and enduring beauty.











01




### Olive Wood


Olea europaea


Olive wood is among the most storied timbers in the world вҖ” grown slowly over decades in Mediterranean groves, its grain is a living record of patience. The wood reveals swirling, unpredictable patterns of cream, honey, and deep amber that no two pieces share alike. Its fine, dense texture takes polish beautifully, rewarding the hand with a silken warmth that only deepens with use. In our handmade craft pieces, olive wood brings a sense of ancient rootedness вҖ” a material that carries cultural memory and spiritual resonance in every ring.


- Intricate swirling grain

- Honey, cream & amber tones

- Dense, fine-textured hardwood

- Deeply polishable surface















02




### Acacia Wood


Acacia spp.


Acacia commands attention through strength and warmth. Its grain runs bold and direct вҖ” rich caramel and walnut-brown tones layered with natural variation that speaks of resilience and vitality. One of the hardest commercially available timbers, acacia resists wear and moisture with quiet confidence, making it an ideal foundation for functional pieces that live in daily life. Its open-grain texture creates a tactile richness that contrasts beautifully with polished resin, and its warmth grounds every piece with an earthy, generous character that feels both modern and timeless.


- Bold, directional grain

- Caramel, walnut & gold tones

- Exceptionally hard & durable

- Moisture-resistant surface
















### Blue Resin вҖ” The River Within


The epoxy resin we use is chosen not merely as a filler, but as a co-material вҖ” a living element that brings movement and light into every piece. Our signature blue resin ranges from deep sapphire to translucent cobalt, shifting in tone as light passes through it at different angles. Where wood offers warmth and grain, resin offers depth and luminosity вҖ” a river-like flow that winds through the natural landscape of the timber rather than concealing it.


The translucency is intentional. Beneath the surface, you can trace the wood grain continuing beneath the resin, creating a layered visual depth that rewards close looking. The contrast is not a conflict вҖ” it is a conversation between the organic and the crystalline, the ancient and the contemporary. In our handmade gifts and cutting boards, this blue accent brings a modern edge that speaks to design-conscious homes while preserving the soul of the natural material beneath.











Why Choose Handcrafted

## Crafted to Last. Meant to Be Treasured.


Every piece we create stands apart from mass production вҖ” shaped by hand, finished with intention, and built to carry meaning across generations. These are not just objects. They are stories told in wood and resin.











### One of a Kind



No two pieces are ever identical. The natural grain of olive and acacia wood, combined with hand-poured epoxy resin, ensures that every cutting board and mezuzah carries a unique pattern вҖ” a fingerprint of the earth itself. When you own one of our pieces, you own something that exists nowhere else in the world.










### Built to Endure



Olive and acacia are among the hardest, most resilient woods on earth вҖ” prized for centuries for their density and natural oils. Sealed with food-safe epoxy resin and finished to a smooth, protective surface, our pieces resist warping, cracking, and daily wear. This is craftsmanship designed not just for today, but for decades of use.










### A Gift That Carries Weight



Whether it is a handmade mezuzah marking a new home or a natural cutting board celebrating a milestone, our pieces make meaningful handmade gifts that speak louder than anything found in mass retail. For weddings, housewarmings, or Judaica occasions, these are keepsakes that will be remembered long after the moment has passed.










### Artisan Finish, Every Time



Each piece leaves our workshop only when it meets the highest standard of finish. Hand-sanded through multiple grits, polished to reveal the wood's natural warmth, and inspected for structural integrity вҖ” the care invested in every item reflects our belief that functional art deserves the same reverence as gallery work. Shopping handmade means choosing that standard of excellence.










Handcrafted with intention. Built to last generations.

Every piece we create carries the warmth of natural wood and the soul of the maker's hand вҖ” designed for homes that value beauty, meaning, and craft.

The Studio Collection

# A Visual Journey Through Natural Wood & Resin


Each piece in this gallery is a window into our studio's visual language вҖ” the way olive wood grain meets flowing epoxy resin, how acacia's warm amber tones carry a handcrafted cutting board from raw material to functional art, and how the quiet weight of a hand-carved mezuzah holds both beauty and meaning. Browse this curated collection of handmade gifts and artisan pieces, each shaped by patient hands and an eye for natural detail.







Olive wood & acacia В· Epoxy resin В· Handcrafted in the studio








## Crafted by Hand, Built to Last


Each piece in our collection is shaped from olive wood and acacia, fused with flowing epoxy resin вҖ” a gallery of handmade gifts online shopping enthusiasts and design-conscious collectors return to again and again.

Commission a Piece







Where Each Piece Lives

## Crafted for Every Corner of Life


From the kitchen counter to the doorpost, each handmade piece finds its natural home вҖ” bringing warmth, meaning, and artisan beauty into everyday spaces.












### The Refined Kitchen


Our natural cutting boards are as much about beauty as function. Crafted from olive wood and acacia with hand-poured epoxy resin, they become the quiet centrepiece of any kitchen вҖ” equally at home displayed on a counter or used for artful serving spreads. Each grain pattern is entirely unique, making every board a one-of-a-kind piece of functional art for the design-conscious home.

Serving & Display Boards











### Meaningful Judaica & Gifting


A handcrafted mezuzah is more than a doorpost blessing вҖ” it is a deeply personal gift that carries cultural significance and artisan soul. Our large olive wood and epoxy mezuzahs make extraordinary presents for housewarmings, weddings, bar and bat mitzvahs, and life milestones. Shopping handmade means giving something irreplaceable: a spiritual keepsake built with intention, offered with love, and treasured for generations.

Ceremonial Gifting & Judaica











### Interior Display & Heirloom Objects


Beyond utility, our handcrafted pieces become objects of quiet contemplation in any interior. Placed on a shelf, a sideboard, or a dining table, the natural grain of olive wood and the luminous flow of river-blue epoxy resin draw the eye and invite conversation. These are heirloom-quality objects вҖ” made slowly, made well вҖ” that evolve with your home and hold their beauty across decades. Discover handmade gifts online that truly endure.

Interior & Heirloom Display











## Have a Piece in Mind?


Whether you're drawn to a particular wood grain, searching for a meaningful handmade gift, or envisioning a custom mezuzah or cutting board with its own character вҖ” we'd love to hear about it. Every piece begins with a conversation.

Let's Talk About Your Piece






Handcrafted with intention. Built to last generations.

Every piece we create carries the warmth of natural wood and the soul of the maker's hand вҖ” designed for homes that value beauty, meaning, and craft.

Get in Touch

# Let's Talk About Your Perfect Piece


Whether you're searching for a meaningful handmade gift, curious about olive wood and acacia cutting boards, or drawn to a large handcrafted mezuzah вҖ” we'd love to hear from you. Reach out with questions about availability, wood preference, resin tone, or the spiritual significance woven into every piece we create.


Every conversation is the beginning of something beautifully made. We welcome inquiries about custom-style discussions, gifting guidance, and anything that moves you toward a piece that feels truly yours.





Custom piece discussions



Gifting guidance & availability



Wood & resin tone selection





Handcrafted from olive wood & acacia вҖ” made with intention












### Thoughtful Replies, Every Time


We read every message carefully and respond within 1вҖ“2 business days. Each inquiry is personal to us вҖ” whether you have a question about a piece already made or something you'd like created just for you, we give it our full attention.








### Choosing the Right Piece


Not sure whether a natural cutting board in olive or acacia wood is the right gift, or whether a handcrafted mezuzah would speak more deeply? We're happy to guide you. Tell us who it's for and the occasion, and we'll help you find something meaningful from our handmade gifts collection.








### Every Piece Is One of a Kind


Natural wood grain, epoxy flow, and resin colour vary slightly from piece to piece вҖ” and that's entirely intentional. These variations are not imperfections; they are the signature of handcrafted work. No two pieces are ever identical, which is precisely what makes each one yours.












## Frequently Asked Questions


Everything you need to know about our handmade wood and epoxy pieces вҖ” from material character to care, gifting, and custom inquiries.





All Products














### Will my piece look exactly like the photos?



Each piece is entirely handcrafted from natural olive or acacia wood, meaning no two are identical. Wood grain patterns, knots, and the flow of epoxy resin vary organically from piece to piece. These natural variations are not imperfections вҖ” they are the signature of genuine handmade craft. The photos show representative examples; your piece will carry its own unique character.





### How do I care for my cutting board or mezuzah?



For cutting boards, hand wash with mild soap and warm water вҖ” never soak or place in a dishwasher. Dry immediately and apply food-safe mineral oil every few months to nourish the wood and keep the epoxy resin vibrant. For mezuzahs and decorative pieces, simply wipe with a soft dry cloth. Avoid prolonged direct sunlight to preserve the depth of the resin colors.










### Are these pieces suitable as meaningful gifts?



Absolutely. Our handmade gifts are among the most thoughtful you can find when shopping handmade вҖ” each one is a functional work of art with lasting material beauty. Whether you're looking for a housewarming present, a wedding gift, or a meaningful Judaica keepsake like one of our large handcrafted mezuzahs, every piece arrives with the care and intention of something truly made by hand.





### Can I inquire about a similar or custom piece?



Yes вҖ” we welcome direct conversations about your vision. If you've seen a piece you love and would like something in a similar style, size, or wood combination, reach out through our contact form or message us directly. While each creation is one-of-a-kind, we're happy to discuss possibilities and guide you toward a piece that feels made just for you.
















## Get in Touch


Every piece we create begins with a conversation. Whether you're looking for a handmade gift, a custom cutting board, or a mezuzah with personal meaning вҖ” we'd love to hear from you.

Send Inquiry







We respond to every inquiry personally and with care. Because each piece is handcrafted from natural olive wood, acacia, and epoxy resin, slight variations in grain and colour are part of what makes your item uniquely yours. We'll always confirm details before we begin.






Handcrafted with intention. Built to last generations.

Every piece we create carries the warmth of natural wood and the soul of the maker's hand вҖ” designed for homes that value beauty, meaning, and craft.

# Return Policy


Last Updated: 6/2/2026



At Natural Wood Art, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: support@nwooda.com


Phone: +972505588259


Address: 4522570, ISRAEL

рҹҮ«рҹҮ· FranГ§ais

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  3/26/2026



Natural Wood Art ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website https://nwooda.com ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Natural Wood Art

- Email: support@nwooda.com

- Phone: +972505588259

- Address: 4522570, ISRAEL



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice







Handcrafted with intention. Built to last generations.

Every piece we create carries the warmth of natural wood and the soul of the maker's hand вҖ” designed for homes that value beauty, meaning, and craft.

# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  March 26, 2026



Natural Wood Art is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Natural Wood Art

- Email: support@nwooda.com

- Phone: +972505588259



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  March 26, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Natural Wood Art

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - handmade crafts & woodworking provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Natural Wood Art provides handmade crafts & woodworking through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Natural Wood Art. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Natural Wood Art

- Email: support@nwooda.com

- Phone: +972505588259

- Address: 4522570, ISRAEL

## Product Catalog

### Special products
URL: https://nwooda.com/product/special-products-6muuvm
Price: 0.00 USD
Availability: In stock

These products are more than just household items; they are statement pieces. They bridge the gap between the earthy, warm tones of the Mediterranean and the minimalist, polished finish of contemporary design. Whether used as a gift or a home upgrade, they symbolize luxury, roots, and creativity.

---

### Mezuzahs  olive wood and epoxy
URL: https://nwooda.com/product/mezuzahs-olive-wood-and-epoxy-w6nea7
Price: 79.00 USD (sale, was 90.00 USD)
Availability: In stock

Mezuzahs that combine olive wood and epoxy (synthetic resin) are unique pieces of art that combine natural, raw materials with modern, luxurious design. This combination creates a "Natural Wood Art" look in which each mezuzah is one of a kind.

---

### olive wood cutting bord
URL: https://nwooda.com/product/olive-wood-cutting-bord-nf3hg3
Price: 250.00 USD (sale, was 320.00 USD)
Availability: In stock

This cutting board is a high-end artisanal piece that blends the rustic, ancient beauty of natural olive wood with the sleek, modern aesthetic of liquid resin. Each board is a one-of-a-kind creation , as the resin follows the unique, organic contours of the specific wood slab used.

---

### Indian Rosewood cutting bord
URL: https://nwooda.com/product/indian-rosewood-cutting-bord-nzusha
Price: 250.00 USD (sale, was 320.00 USD)
Availability: In stock

Indian Rosewood cutting bord

---
